titleStmt.title: SII 24.101: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 101. (A.R. No. 22 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records the order (niyōgam) of the Peruṅguṟi-mahā-sabhā of the village ••••• maṅgalam to re-impose the iṟaiyili tenure in lieu of a sum of three kaḻañju and •• mañjāḍi of gold on certain cultivable lands which were under iṟaikāval from the 2nd to the 40th year of the king's reign. The record is dated in the 44th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Uṟimaiyiṟ ciṟantu maṇi muṭi cūṭi mīna mel kaṭaloya tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkara naṭātta vīra siṅhāsanattu Avaṉi muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecari panmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4 maṅkalattu peṟuṅkuṟi mahāsa
bhaiyom niyokaṅ kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr viḷai nila vatikku meṟkku kaṭuvāykku vaṭakku nārāyaṇa periya tiruṉantavānappuṟamāṉa ṉilam nālu mā mukkāṇi nila nālu mā mukkāṇiyum Ittevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu mutal 4 10 vatu varai Iṟaiyili taviṟtu I Itu paḻampaṭiye Iṟai kāva lāka ye O
nṟukku pon Araik kaḻañce kunṟiyāka vanta pon mukkaḻañce mañcāṭipponnuṅ koṇṭu Ipponnukku paḻampaṭiye Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭutto neṭṭu nāṭṭu śrīvaiṣṇavarkku tiruvaraṅkap piccarkku peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Inni ttavarai An=tarāyam vayittu Iṟai kkaṭavār yannā
yakkaṭavarallaātāraākavum Ippiramāṇappaṭiye kalveṭṭi cantirātittavarai Iṟaiyili Uṇṇakkaṭavārāka Ipperiya ṉeṭṭu ṉāṭṭu śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukku Inniyogaṅ peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyoṭu tiruvaṭi paṇiyāl Ūrkkaṇakku Ātanūruṭaiyara nen Ivai Ippaṭikku Ivai Anpil pālāciri yan śrī vāsudeva
ttu
kku Ivai van Aḻakiya maṇa vāḷa paṭṭanen Ivai Enneḻuttu I pālāśrī yan kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu putuccoṭṭai Iṭaiyānāna Ula mūventa
Āyanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Anpil pālāśrīyan Appirameyan Aṉan=ta nārāyaṇanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven yānen Ippaṭi
śrīvayiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
